name: kaizen-vscode
description: Send your latest Kensho test run to a Kaizen workspace from inside VS Code.
_publisherTodo: TODO: set `publisher` once we register a marketplace publisher account (kaizenreport).

commands.title: Kensho: Send last run to Kaizen

kaizen.kenshoResultsPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the kensho-results/ directory written by your test reporter.

kaizen.token.markdownDescription: Kaizen API token (`kz_…`). For real use, prefer storing the token via VS Code's secret storage — see the extension README. This setting is read as a fallback.

kaizen.server.description: Kaizen API base URL. Override for self-hosted.

kaizen.kenshoVersion.description: Version of @kaizenreport/kensho to invoke via npx.
